recommendations.title: Begotten
recommendations.overview: Begotten is the creation myth brought to life, the story of no less than the violent death of God and the (re)birth of nature on a barren earth.

recommendations.title: Lawrence of Arabia
recommendations.overview: During World War I, English officer Thomas Edward 'T.E.' Lawrence sets out to unite and lead the diverse, often warring, Arab tribes to fight the Turks.

recommendations.title: MirrorMask
recommendations.overview: In a fantasy world of opposing kingdoms, a 15-year old girl must find the fabled MirrorMask in order to save the kingdom and get home.

recommendations.title: The Last Legion
recommendations.overview: As the Roman empire crumbles, young Romulus Augustus flees the city and embarks on a perilous voyage to Britain to track down a legion of supporters.

recommendations.title: Double World
recommendations.overview: Keen to bring honor to his clan, young villager Dong Yilong embarks on a perilous journey to compete in a tournament that selects warriors for battle.

recommendations.title: The Twilight Saga: Breaking Dawn - Part 2
recommendations.overview: After the birth of Renesmee, the Cullens gather other vampire clans in order to protect the child from a false allegation that puts the family in front of the Volturi.

recommendations.title: Tokyo Tribe
recommendations.genres: Music, Science Fiction, Action, Drama, Crime
recommendations.overview: In an alternate Japan, territorial street gangs form opposing factions collectively known as the Tokyo Tribes. Merra, leader of the Wu-Ronz tribe of Bukuro, joins forces with heavy-hitting gangster Buppa of Buppa Town. With Buppa's support, Merra aim

recommendations.title: A Part of You
recommendations.overview: A teenager struggles to pick up the pieces of her shattered world in this emotional and bittersweet coming-of-age drama about those who are left behind.

recommendations.title: Nausicaä of the Valley of the Wind
recommendations.overview: After a global war, the seaside kingdom known as the Valley of the Wind remains one of the last strongholds on Earth untouched by a poisonous jungle and the powerful insects that guard it. Led by the courageous Princess Nausicaä, the people of the Va

recommendations.title: My Days of Mercy
recommendations.overview: The daughter of a man on death row falls in love with a woman on the opposing side of her family's political cause.
